---
name: Framework Request
about: Request support for a new framework
title: "[Framework] "
labels: framework-request
---

**Framework name**
e.g., Spring Boot, Flutter, Rust/Actix

**Language**
e.g., Java, Dart, Rust

**Common project structure**
```
src/
  main/java/com/example/
    controllers/
    services/
    models/
```

**Key conventions**
- Formatter: (e.g., `spotless`, `dartfmt`)
- Test runner: (e.g., `./gradlew test`, `flutter test`)
- Package manager: (e.g., Gradle, pub, Cargo)

**Common review checklist items**
What should the code review agent check for? (e.g., dependency injection, null safety, error handling patterns)

**Would you help contribute?**
- [ ] I'd like to help implement this framework support
- [ ] I can review/test the implementation
